content.en:
The years passed.

After Ye Tian obtained the resources from the Black Silence Dao Ancestor in the copy body of the Xuanyu Pavilion, he began to use these resources to improve his strength, assisting the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body, making his body stronger and stronger.

When the resources that would help the Endless Yuan Dao refine his body were exhausted, he would sell some resources suitable for the Sevenfold Ancestor to trade and buy the resources he needed.

In a short period of time, he will not need to go out to find resources.

......

In the Xuanyu Pavilion, there are often sevenfold origin ancestors preaching, talking about the cultivation of the Yuan Dao and the half-step path of the sevenfold origin ancestor and the sevenfold origin ancestor cultivation.

Therefore, Ye Tian often listened to the sermons of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, in addition to listening to the sermons, he usually cultivated and tempered his body.

And just like that, the days passed slowly.

Ye Tian broke the boundaries again and again, and his strength naturally became stronger and stronger.

has enough resources, and it is also a very good resource, but it is better than the primordial vine liquid, I don't know how many times, so Ye Tian's cultivation speed is extremely fast.

In just tens of millions of Origin Domain Eras, Ye Tian had broken the boundary fifteen times.

Although compared to many top half-step sevenfold origin ancestors who had broken the boundaries dozens of times, Ye Tian had not broken many boundaries.

However, the strength he increases every time he breaks the boundary is also incomparable to others.

Especially in the back, every time the boundary is broken, the gap will be very large.

However, there is a limit to the number of times each half-step Sevenfold Ancestor can break the boundary.

For example, a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the eightfold yuan path can only break the boundary sixty-four times at most, while a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the ninefold yuan path can break the limit eighty-one times.

If a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao has really broken through the eighty-one boundaries and perfectly broken through to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, how terrifying is his strength, those Sevenfold Origin Ancestors who have only comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao are simply incomparable, and the gap is too big.

Of course, even if it was a half-step sevenfold ancestor who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, it would be too difficult to break through the eighty-one boundary.

If you can't give full play to the potential of the Ninefold Yuan Dao and break the boundary too few times, if you go to attack the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, it won't be too strong in the future, although you can suppress those Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao, but it's not invincible.

In short, Dao Ancestor, who has achieved perfection in every realm, is truly invincible.

Ye Tian's goal was naturally to break the eighty-one boundaries, even if this goal was difficult, he had to do it, otherwise wouldn't it be a waste of his Endless Yuan Dao.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of years of the Primordial Era have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's resources suitable for assisting the Yuan Dao to refine his body were exhausted, after all, the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor didn't need this kind of treasure, so naturally he wouldn't save too much.

So far, he's only broken the boundaries seventeen times.

"I'm going to have to change resources!"

Ye Tian took out some resources suitable for the use of the Sevenfold Ancestor and then exchanged them for points in the Xuanyu Pavilion, and then purchased resources that could suit him.

Although this kind of exchange transaction will lose money, after all, Xuanyu Pavilion will earn the middle price difference.

However, if you do so, it is more convenient!

He didn't have the idea of trading elsewhere, and even if he did trade enough resources, he would easily be targeted by some Sevenfold Ancestors.

So, he didn't bother to trade elsewhere.

In the following years, Ye Tian had enough resources, so he went all out to cultivate and refine his body, and broke the boundaries again and again.

But later, even if there are more resources, the more difficult it will be.

Moreover, having comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, the price he paid for each time he broke the boundary was far greater than that of the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors.

It can be said that any Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao will need resources in his cultivation that other Dao Ancestors cannot imagine!

Ordinary forces can't cultivate a Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao at all, and they don't dare to cultivate it with all their might, so they can only rely on Dao Ancestor himself.

Therefore, those Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao have grown very slowly.

But once you grow up, you're really invincible!

It's a pity that the Dao Ancestor who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, in the process of growing up, fell a lot, some fell in some forbidden places, and some were assassinated.

Of course, other Dao Ancestors fell more.

......

Xinggu Giant City.

On this day, on the silent black sea outside the city, a dense network of primordial antiquities appeared, and all kinds of primordial antiquities appeared.

The strength of these primordial artifacts was uneven, the weaker ones were only comparable to the sixfold primordial ancestors, and the powerful ones were comparable to the sevenfold primordial ancestors.

"Primordial Antiquities Siege!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, sensed it, and found a lot of extremely terrifying primordial antiquities.

And at this time, the countless Dao Ancestors in the entire Star Gu Giant City were also a little panicked.

"Don't panic, it's normal. Every long time, there will be such a siege of primordial antiquities, and after a while, they will retreat!"

It was a sevenfold peak ancestor who spoke!

There are many sevenfold peak ancestors in Star Ancient Giant City, but they don't have a half-step eightfold ancestor who has been in charge for a long time, but they can ask for a half-step eightfold ancestor in time.

If there is really a half-step eightfold ancestor-level primordial artifact, there will be a half-step eightfold ancestor to help, but there is no need to ask the half-step eightfold ancestor to move it now, and it can be carried by relying on the strength of the Star Ancient Giant City itself.

But.

Even if it is a half-step eightfold primordial ancestor, there is no way to kill all the primordial artifacts here, for example, those primordial ancients who are comparable to the peak level of the sevenfold primordial ancestor are very difficult to kill, and ordinary half-step eightfold primordial ancestors can't do it.

Abrupt.

The formation of the Star Ancient Giant City activated, enveloping countless primordial artifacts outside the city.

At this time, representatives of the great forces began to order many Dao Ancestors to fight against these primordial antiquities.

And the high-level officials of the Xuanyu Pavilion also issued such an order, and Ye Tian naturally received the order as well.

......

"What a mysterious formation, it actually divides the territory outside the city into pieces of time and space, and it can accurately distinguish their strength!"

At this moment, the time and space that Ye Tian went to was the time and space where the half-step sevenfold ancestor-level primordial artifacts were located, and the primordial artifacts of this space-time were all half-step sevenfold ancestor-level.

In this way, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor would not encounter the Sevenfold Ancestor-level Primordial Antiquities, and their safety would naturally be guaranteed.

And if you really can't beat it, if you are about to fall, you can retreat with a thought.

Unless the difference in strength is really too big and is instantaneous by the primordial antiquities, it will hardly fall.

Therefore, countless Dao Ancestors dared to enter the territory shrouded by this formation to help kill these primordial artifacts and reduce the burden on the Star Ancient Giant City.

Otherwise, even if these primordial artifacts continued to attack the formation, the formation of the Star Ancient Giant City would not last long.

And killing these primordial artifacts, some of the primordial artifacts also gave birth to good treasures, so for many Dao Ancestors, this time is also a chance!
